name: Hannah MacIsaac

style.name: Seasonal Specialist
style.description: Ties every post to current NS season: lobster season, tourist season, winter, grad season

bio: Your neighborhood nail artist in the Eastern Reach (Sherbrooke) area 🌊 Onyx treatment, gels, waxing & more. Call (902) 885-7896 to book!
